title: 401 Error on DELETE request with Xano integration
symptom: Weweb shows a status code 401 for DELETE requests, despite Xano successfully deleting the item from the database.
applies_when: Using Xano integration for DELETE requests
not_this_if: DELETE request is made via REST API plugin
User has insufficient permissions in Xano
root_cause: The 401 error indicates an authentication issue, which may arise from the way Weweb handles user sessions or token validation when making requests to Xano. Even if Xano processes the request, Weweb may not recognize the successful operation due to this mismatch.
fix_steps: Ensure the user is properly authenticated in Weweb
Check the roles and permissions of the user in Xano
Try deleting records using the Xano integration instead of the REST API plugin
agent_instruction: Verify user authentication and permissions in Xano, then use the Xano integration for DELETE requests.
